chapter_title: Acquisition of Pub. Interest in Private Rd. by Certain Counties
text:
A person asserting a right, title, or interest in a private road in which a public interest is asserted under this chapter may file suit in a district court in the county in which the road is located not later than the second anniversary after the later of:

(1) the date that the resolution required by Section 281.005 (Resolution of Commissioners Court) is recorded; or

(2) the date the notice required by Section 281.006 (Notice to Owner Required) is given to the owner.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 281. Acquisition of Pub. Interest in Private Rd. by Certain Counties
##### § 281.007 — Contest

A person asserting a right, title, or interest in a private road in which a public interest is asserted under this chapter may file suit in a district court in the county in which the road is located not later than the second anniversary after the later of:

    (1) the date that the resolution required by Section 281.005 (Resolution of Commissioners Court) is recorded; or

    (2) the date the notice required by Section 281.006 (Notice to Owner Required) is given to the owner.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: A person asserting a right, title, or interest in a private road in which a public interest is asserted under this chapter may file suit in a district court in the county in which the road is located not later than the second anniversary after the later of:
the date that the resolution required by Section 281.005 (Resolution of Commissioners Court) is recorded; or
the date the notice required by Section 281.006 (Notice to Owner Required) is given to the owner.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
